ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tv_shows" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV show */,
  "tv_show_name" TEXT /* Name of the TV show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV show */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Premiere date of the TV show */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the TV show */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "network" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the show */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the show's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number in the series */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the episode director */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Name of the episode writer */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the episode */,
  "production_location" TEXT /* Location where the episode was filmed */,
  "rewatch_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the episode has been rewatched */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the episode's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_tv_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("tv_show_id") REFERENCES tv_shows ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the guest */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the guest */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the guest */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the guest */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the guest's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_guests" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the guest appeared in */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest */,
  "appearance_type" TEXT /* Type of appearance */,
  "appearance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the guest's appearance in the episode */,
  "episode_role" TEXT /* Role of the guest in the episode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the guest appearance information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the format belongs to */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of format (e.g., video, audio, transcript) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the format file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the format file */,
  "format_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the format */,
  "format_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the format file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the format information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_formats_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the rating belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided with the rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the review belongs to */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_author" TEXT /* Name of the author who wrote the review */,
  "review_source_url" TEXT /* URL where the full review can be found */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the review information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production staff, writer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_tv_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("tv_show_id") REFERENCES tv_shows ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production team */,
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show the team is working on */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the production team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's responsibilities */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Current status of the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the team's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_teams_tv_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("tv_show_id") REFERENCES tv_shows ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the member left the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the team member's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES production_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_production" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production team working on the episode */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Production notes */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Total cost incurred during production */,
  "production_location_details" TEXT /* Detailed location information where the episode was filmed */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the production */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the production information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_production_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES production_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_airing" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "air_time" TEXT /* Air time of the episode */,
  "air_network" TEXT /* Air network of the episode */,
  "reair_date" TEXT /* Date of the next reairing */,
  "reair_time" TEXT /* Time of the next reairing */,
  "reair_network" TEXT /* Network where the episode will reair */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the airing information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)
